The question where you put "non-deuterocanonical" was a bit confusing. Wasn't sure if you meant deuterocanonical (as an alterative to "apocrypha") but accidentally added the "non" or if you meant like other books that were not included in the Canon by the Early Church Councils in addition to the deuterocanonical books.

Thanks & God Bless! : )
